author: franklin-md
description: Deeply integrated AI Agents powered by your OpenAI subscription. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Alessandro Farace & Antonia Boca
manifest.description: Deeply integrated AI Agents powered by your OpenAI subscription.
manifest.name: Franklin

name: Franklin

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# @Mention Pages, Auto Share Open Files, Reference Engine

## What's Changed
* Remove web fetch cache by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/193
* Match Obsidian modifier-click behavior for wikilinks by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/194
* Guide Obsidian agents toward concise wikilinks by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/195
* Read extension can read images by @tieguanyin-tea in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/196
* Refactor extension modules around extension points by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/197
* FRA-311 Declare missing @franklin/extensions dependencies by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/198
* [FRA-312] Expose turnStart observer registration by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/199
* refactor(extensions): move state resolution into algebra by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/200
* refactor(extensions): move extension authoring into algebra by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/202
* Split extension point registry binding by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/203
* refactor(extensions): rename API algebra signatures by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/204
* Refactor extension setup into transform pipeline by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/205
* refactor(extensions): split store state module by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/207
* Move extensions orchestrator module by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/206
* Refactor extensions algebra type surface by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/208
* fix(ui): brighten demo dark foreground by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/210
* Rename MiniACP context API types by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/211
* Split Core state module by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/209
* PDF processing by @tieguanyin-tea in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/201
* Add conversation title flow to agent chats by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/212
* Wrap long Obsidian wikilinks by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/213
* refactor: replace runtime subscriptions with typed events by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/214
* Refactor extension packages into agent and extensibility by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/215
* Refactor extensibility public module surface by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/217
* Refactor extensibility dependency runtime lift by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/216
* Refactor Mini-ACP export surface by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/218
* Refactor agent platform spawn type by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/219
* Refactor @franklin/agent root exports by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/220
* Refactor agent session persistence by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/221
* refactor: simplify app agents orchestration by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/222
* Inject AuthManager into FranklinApp by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/223
* Inline agent storage persister setup by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/224
* Select PDF provider from runtime auth by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/225
* Simplify Franklin app extension configuration by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/226
* Refactor host actions and harness context by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/227
* Refactor agent core registration compiler by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/228
* Refactor agent core extension test suites by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/229
* feat(extensibility): add registration priority transforms by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/230
* Refactor core decorator layers by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/231
* refactor: flatten MiniACP context prompt fields by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/232
* Add extensibility configuration module pattern by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/233
* Refactor prompt decorator flow by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/234
* docs(extensibility): clarify priority precedence by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/235
* Refactor agent core runtime state ownership by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/236
* Add computed extensibility configuration support by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/237
* Add lifecycle unload module by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/238
* Pin package dependency versions by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/239
* Add extension-level priority wrappers by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/241
* Refactor web search providers by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/242
* Collect configuration inputs by default by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/240
* Refactor tool result rendering semantics by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/243
* Test spawn extension behavior by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/244
* refactor(agent): introduce tool registry by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/245
* feat(web-search): render provider metadata by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/246
* Refactor core prompt context sync by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/248
* [FRA-332] Define JSON persistence boundaries by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/247
* Persist orchestrator runtime details by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/250
* Hide pending web search summaries by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/249
* Hide non-visible sessions from agent navigation by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/251
* Preserve rendered tool output by default by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/252
* Expose runtime tool registry by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/253
* fix: re-enable spawn extension for Obsidian by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/254
* refactor(agent): clean core registration boundaries by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/255
* Render named spawn summaries by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/256
* Update Gemini Flash model catalog by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/257
* Refactor agent core context boundaries by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/258
* Add Qwen3.7 Max OpenRouter support by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/259
* Support Gemini 3.5 Flash on OpenRouter by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/260
* fix(agent): preserve overlapping tool call timing by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/261
* refactor(agent): replace core decorators with controller by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/263
* Expose filesystem bundle separately by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/264
* Refactor Mini-ACP Pi agent runtime by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/265
* Show OpenAI credentials first in Obsidian settings by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/266
* feat(ui): render PDF tool summaries by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/267
* Simplify tool row status rendering by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/268
* Align conversation chrome tokens by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/269
* Add file mentions to prompt input by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/270
* Refactor prompt editor surface styling by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/271
* Fix mention menu Enter handling and add browser UI tests by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/272
* Fix README plugin badges by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/275
* Fix Obsidian menu accent color by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/274
* Fix editor prompt file badge line height by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/276
* Add reference-backed context materialization by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/273
* Fix Mini-ACP context restore tool names by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/277
* Adjust Obsidian conversation markdown font size by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/278
* Support user prompt content edits by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/279
* Refactor file search into file index by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/280
* Connect reference mentions to references by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/281
* Add Obsidian viewing context sharing by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/282


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/compare/0.0.5...0.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Sub Agents, PDF Providers, Extensibility Package, Configuration Module

## What's Changed
* Remove web fetch cache by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/193
* Match Obsidian modifier-click behavior for wikilinks by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/194
* Guide Obsidian agents toward concise wikilinks by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/195
* Read extension can read images by @tieguanyin-tea in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/196
* Refactor extension modules around extension points by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/197
* FRA-311 Declare missing @franklin/extensions dependencies by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/198
* [FRA-312] Expose turnStart observer registration by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/199
* refactor(extensions): move state resolution into algebra by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/200
* refactor(extensions): move extension authoring into algebra by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/202
* Split extension point registry binding by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/203
* refactor(extensions): rename API algebra signatures by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/204
* Refactor extension setup into transform pipeline by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/205
* refactor(extensions): split store state module by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/207
* Move extensions orchestrator module by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/206
* Refactor extensions algebra type surface by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/208
* fix(ui): brighten demo dark foreground by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/210
* Rename MiniACP context API types by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/211
* Split Core state module by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/209

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add README banner image by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/162
* Document npm ci setup for contributors by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/167
* Move Obsidian manifest.json to repo root by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/168
* Support host markdown styling in conversation UI by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/169
* Unblock Obsidian review install by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/170
* Add Obsidian ESLint plugin by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/171
* Ignore local Claude settings by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/176
* Confirm Obsidian release before mutating files by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/177
* Refactor extension module harness and authoring API by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/178
* Refactor Mini-ACP RPC into connector boundary by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/179
* Fix glob limit warning by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/180
* Remove memory budget script wrappers by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/182
* Treat glob limit zero as no limit by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/183
* Enable Obsidian shell prompt safeguards by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/181
* feat(mini-acp): add scripted mock connector by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/184
* Prevent conversation transcript event loop starvation by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/185

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add @franklin/mini-acp package: types, pi-adapter, JSON-RPC transport by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/6
* Conversation UI: extension refactor, markdown rendering, component hierarchy by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/15
* Fix tool calling failures caused by $schema in JSON Schema output by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/16
* Add Mini-ACP spec tester conformance framework by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/17
* Emit TurnStart in Mini-ACP: spec point, types, and implementation (FRA-27) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/18
* Resolve Pi adapter model from context config by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/20
* Chunk and update semantics, tool observer events, spec tester by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/21
* Spec tester: partial setContext and tools in actions (FRA-70) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/22
* RuntimeSystem algebra: composable session lifecycle factories by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/24
* Thread isError from ToolResult through to ToolUseBlock (FRA-84) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/25
* StopCode system + unresolvable LLMConfig handling (FRA-69) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/23
* Headless conversation renderer API with tool registry by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/26
* Add auth-specific stop codes to Mini-ACP Pi adapter by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/27
* Refactor extension bundles and tool specs by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/28
* TurnEnd block rendering with registry pattern (FRA-85) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/29
* Typed tool renderer args via ToolSpec bindings (FRA-89) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/30
* App settings plumbing: persisted store, LLM config helpers, React hook (FRA-97) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/31
* Add bash extension and sandboxed terminal by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/33
* Add autosizing prompt input control bar by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/32
* Register Franklin on OpenRouter requests by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/35
* Add thinking level toggle, model selector, icon registry, and prompt components by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/36
* Add Linear workflow conventions to CLAUDE.md by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/37
* FRA-129: document AgentSystem architecture by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/39
* Add Git hooks for format and check by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/40
* Web fetch extension & API by @tieguanyin-tea in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/41
* Add Obsidian placeholder plugin shell by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/34
* Fix CtxTracker: track tool calls/results on both sides (FRA-130) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/38
* Simplify extension tool result handling by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/42
* Add generic dependency system for app singletons by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/43
* feat(extensions): edit and write tools refresh read cache (FRA-71) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/46
* feat: cancel button replaces send during agent turns (FRA-135) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/45
* Allow prompt input during active turn by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/44
* Web search extension by @tieguanyin-tea in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/48
* FRA-132 Add debugMiniACP for Mini-ACP by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/47
* FRA-136: SessionSystem + RuntimeSystem session lifecycle by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/49
* FRA-106 Bring up Obsidian styling by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/50
* FRA-153 Add headless agent list controller by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/51
* Refactor proxy runtime binding and fix Electron proxy IPC by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/52
* FRA-155: Shared App UI — Vite migration + @franklin/ui package by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/54
* Simplify auth runtime and proxy descriptor plumbing by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/55
* FRA-156: Rename Duplex.close to Duplex.dispose and simplify resource cleanup by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/56
* FRA-161 simplify desktop OAuth flow by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/57
* FRA-133 Richer tool summaries and shared file badges by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/58
* FRA-166: Extract generic createEnvironment() and remove environment classes by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/59
* Auth UI: shadcn migration + config-driven shared panels by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/61
* Diff plugin by @tieguanyin-tea in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/60
* Obsidian bundler: Vite→esbuild migration + dev/prod build modes by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/62
* FRA-175: Shared UI package, Storybook, auth/proxy refactors, diff plugin by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/64
* Consolidate @franklin/lib and simplify Vitest aliases by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/65
* Brand absolute filesystem paths and scope app state to app dirs by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/66
* Accept / reject buttons in Diff Editor Plugin do not flicker anymore by @tieguanyin-tea in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/63
* Refactor agent storage into shared modules by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/67
* Add diagnose-log slash command for agent session analysis by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/70
* Better terminal permissions by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/71
* FRA-104: Obsidian environment, runtime, vault + lib consolidation & shared UI by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/69
* FRA-145: Reorganize packages/extensions by API taxonomy by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/73
* FRA-185: Normalize absolute path joins across packages by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/74
* Add Agent.md design notes and Obsidian vault TODOs by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/75
* FRA-196 Consolidate filesystem and web extension bundles by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/76
* FRA-195: add filesystem permission presets by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/77
* FRA-198: Replace raw param prompt waterfall with PromptContext by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/78
* FRA-197: Add type-level and runtime state key collision guard to combine() and SystemBuilder by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/79
* FRA-214: Narrow CoreRuntime API — replace setContext with setLLMConfig by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/81
* FRA-206: system prompt contribution via on('systemPrompt') + middleware extraction by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/80
* Move debug button into conversation additional controls by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/82
* Simplify CoreState by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/83
* [FRA-217] Make setContext history/config merge by property; fix descriptor exports by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/86
* Flatten Obsidian tool rows and badges by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/85
* Define instruction file and spec types by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/84
* Persistence refactor: versioned codec, issue reporting, schema defaults by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/87
* Obsidian Docs by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/88
* [FRA-163] Group host APIs under Platform.os namespace by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/89
* FRA-221: add createObservableFilesystem primitive by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/90
* Fix npm audit vulnerabilities by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/91
* Research: split compile-time API from runtime ctx in extension algebra by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/92
* Deliver extension tools at bootstrap, remove setContext injector by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/93
* Add wikilink resolution to ObsidianFilesystem by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/94
* FRA-223: Introduce identity algebra objects and identity composition by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/95
* FRA-229: expose last-sent Ctx via CoreRuntime.context() for debug dump by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/96
* FRA-150 Refactor runtime snapshot API to state.get/fork/child by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/97
* Remove bashExtension from Obsidian plugin by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/99
* Extract agent harness research into docs wiki by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/100
* FRA-108: Usage tracking across mini-ACP + core folder refactor by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/98
* Fix conversation pane shrinking in narrow layouts by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/102
* Redact API keys from inspect dumps by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/101
* Upgrade pi-ai to 0.68.0 and bump Kimi model to K2.6 by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/105
* Suppress Obsidian form-control defaults inside .franklin by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/106
* FRA-55: reasoning block UI + block lifecycle metadata by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/104
* Add environment info system prompt extension by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/103
* FRA-243: Replace environment.terminal with environment.process (argv-shaped) by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/107
* FRA-167: layer EnvironmentWeb into reusable fetch decorators by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/108
* FRA-246: withAuth must not block setContext on auth resolution failure by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/109
* FRA-244: Replace Obsidian requestUrl transport with node-fetch by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/111
* [FRA-34] Grep tool with rg/grep backends and atomic-block truncation by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/110
* Obsidian diff feature by @tieguanyin-tea in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/113
* FRA-245: add loopback PKCE auth engine helpers by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/112
* Restrict Obsidian agent filesystem access by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/114
* Add OpenRouter model overrides for new frontier models by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/115
* feat(ui): add reusable status indicator by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/116
* feat(react): add ConversationRenderTurn view-model and Footer slot by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/117
* Obsidian agent tabs by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/118
* build: add opt-in memory-budgeted task wrapper by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/119
* Add elapsed waiting footer and align conversation rows by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/120
* Add continue-in-new-chat action to completed conversation turns by @A-F-V in https://github.com/franklin-md/franklin-mono/pull/121
